# SPARQL Update via dataset-prefixed URL
endpoint: sparql_update
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: POST /ds/update works for dataset-prefixed routing

=== request
POST /ds/update
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

update=INSERT%20DATA%20%7B%20%3Chttp%3A%2F%2Fex%2Fb%3E%20%3Chttp%3A%2F%2Fex%2Fp%3E%20%22v%22%20.%20%7D

=== response
200
